metadata.description: QuantumAgent marketplace — three-layer quantum exploration architecture for Claude Code

plugins.name: cosmos
plugins.description: Three-layer architecture for quantum-inspired AI exploration: CLI, YAML DSL, and Python primitives. v3.3 adds cosmos-level model diversity (--models flag, per-cosmos model in YAML) for asymmetric token economics + blind-spot mitigation, plus from_cosmos() Layer-1↔3 interop. v3.2 ships canonical quantum mechanics (CHSH, gates, density matrices, decoherence). Multi-scale macro layer with project spin + singularities. Four entanglement modes including verifiable heartbeat protocol.
